task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS S3 bucket lifecycle policy that deletes objects after 90 days and transitions them to Glacier after 30 days
Write a Python function that takes an AWS IAM policy document (as a dictionary) and returns a list of all the AWS service actions (e.g., 's3:GetObject') that are allowed

Create a regex pattern that validates and extracts the region code from an AWS ARN (Amazon Resource Name) string, such as 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket' or 'arn:aws:ec2:us-east-1:123456789012:instance/i-1234567890abcdef0'
